name: Thief
description: Locks are puzzles, security a challenge. You don't just steal—you perform. Each heist is a work of art, each stolen item a testament to your skill. The world is full of treasures, and you know exactly how to claim them.

feats.name: Slick Hands
feats.description: On your first attempt when making checks related to **Thievery** you add your **Ambition** without a cost.
